data.title: BNB Surpasses 900 USDT with a 7.36% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Aug 22, 2025, 23:43 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 900 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 900.179993 USDT, with a narrowed 7.36% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Cardano’s Bullish Setup Gains Momentum as Whales Accumulate and Hydra Expands
data.description:
Cardano's bullish setup is gaining significant momentum as large investors, commonly referred to as "whales," continue to accumulate more tokens, indicating a strengthening confidence in the cryptocurrency's future. Additionally, the expansion of the Hydra scaling solution is further enhancing the network's capabilities, improving transaction speeds, and scalability, which collectively contribute to a positive outlook for the Cardano ecosystem. As these developments unfold, they are likely to attract more attention and investment, fueling Cardano's upward trajectory in the competitive cryptocurrency market.
source: https://blocknews.com/cardanos-bullish-setup-gain-momentum-as-whales-accumulate-and-hydra-expands/

data.title: Apple sues Oppo over alleged theft of technology
data.description:
Apple sued Oppo, saying it hired a senior Apple Watch engineer and encouraged him to take Apple secrets to make a competing device. The complaint, submitted Thursday in federal court in San Jose, says sensor systems architect Chen Shi covertly drew on Apple’s health-sensing work to support his new role at the Chinese company. The […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/apple-sues-oppo-over-alleged-theft-of-technology/

data.title: Trump Slams Jerome Powell Over “Too Late” Rate Cut Signals: Is This Bullish or Bearish?
data.description:
Former President Donald Trump has criticized Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell for indicating that rate cuts may come too late to effectively stimulate the economy. This development raises questions among investors and analysts about whether these signals will lead to a bullish trend in the markets, suggesting increased investor confidence and economic growth, or a bearish trend, indicating a potential downturn as concerns about economic stability linger.
source: https://blocknews.com/trump-slams-jerome-powell-over-too-late-rate-cut-signals-is-this-bullish-or-bearish/

data.title: DeepSeek’s New “Made in China” AI Chip Could Tank US Crypto Markets
data.description:
DeepSeek is planning to release a new chip for AI software, purportedly developed and manufactured entirely within China. This could have cascading implications for crypto and the US firms that bolster it. Specifically, Trump’s trade war policies pushed China to develop independent AI hardware solutions. Even if this chip is inferior to Nvidia’s, it could still force the US firm out of the entire Chinese market
source: https://beincrypto.com/deepseek-ai-chip-crypto-market-disruption/

data.title: Dogecoin Holds at Key Support as Multiple Bullish Patterns Build
data.description:
Dogecoin has successfully maintained its position at a critical support level, despite fluctuations in the market. At the same time, several bullish patterns are emerging, suggesting potential upward momentum and positive sentiment among investors. These developments indicate that traders are optimistic about Dogecoin's future performance, as various technical indicators point towards a possible rally. The combination of strong support and the formation of multiple bullish patterns may create an advantageous environment for investors looking to capitalize on possible gains in the cryptocurrency's value.
source: https://blocknews.com/dogecoin-holds-at-key-support-as-multiple-bullish-patterns-build/

data.title: Crypto Strategist Sounds The Alarm: Bitcoin Surge Could Clash With Fed Reserve Goals
data.description:
Bitcoin slipped on Friday after a brief run higher, and some market watchers say the move could force a policymaker response. Based on reports, Bitcoin was trading at about $113,240, down 3. 4%, on August 22, 2025. Related Reading: Bitcoin’s Next Stop For 2025? $175,000, According To SOL Strategies Boss Crypto Analyst Flags Inflation Risk According to Bloomberg Intelligence strategist Mike McGlone, the simultaneous rise in equities, Treasury yields, gold and Bitcoin looks unstable and could push inflation higher if it continues
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/crypto-strategist-sounds-the-alarm-bitcoin-surge-could-clash-with-fed-reserve-goals/

data.title: Dow jumps 846 points to record close, S&P and Nasdaq rally over 1.5%
data.description:

That comment came during his speech at the Jackson Hole symposium and triggered a flood of trades across every […]

data.title: Cigarette toss leads to arrest of $13 million crypto conman
data.description:
A 60-year-old fugitive behind a $13 million crypto scam has been caught in South Korea — all because he tossed a cigarette on the street.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cigarette-toss-arrest-13-m-crypto-conman/

data.title: Trump’s Stablecoin Law Pushes CFTC Crypto Sprint but a Key Risk Remains
data.description:
Key Insights: On August 21, 2025, the Commodity Futures Trading Commission stated that it will begin a new CFTC Crypto Sprint. The program is designed to speed up rules for crypto trading in the United States. It came just days after President Donald Trump signed the GENIUS Act, the first federal stablecoin law
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/22/trumps-stablecoin-law-pushes-cftc-crypto-sprint-but-a-key-risk-remains/

data.title: Canada strengthens German trade ties to cushion U.S. tariff fallout
data.description:
Canada is expanding its trade and defense relationship with Germany as a direct response to growing tariff threats from U. S. President Donald Trump, according to reporting from the Parliament Hill press briefing. Prime Minister Mark Carney is heading to Berlin this week, where he will meet German Chancellor Friedrich Merz to strengthen economic cooperation and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/canada-strengthens-german-trade-ties/

data.title: The Great Crypto Divide: Why Wall Street’s old guard still won’t touch crypto
data.description:
Bitcoin and crypto seem to be on the verge of mainstream adoption, with US spot exchange-traded funds (ETFs) shattering inflow records, Goldman Sachs holding more crypto ETF shares issued by BlackRock than any other institution, and corporate treasuries from Strategy to Bitmine embracing digital assets.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/the-great-crypto-divide-why-wall-streets-old-guard-still-wont-touch-crypto/

data.title: Bitcoin Weakness Vs. Ethereum Strength: On-Chain Data Reveals Divergence
data.description:
As Bitcoin (BTC) stalls near the $113,000 level, Ethereum (ETH) continues to show strength, highlighting a clear divergence in price action between the top two cryptocurrencies by market cap. This contrast has some investors considering a rotation from BTC into ETH to capture the latter’s bullish momentum. Bitcoin Shows Correction Risks – Is ETH Safe? According to a CryptoQuant Quicktake post by contributor XWIN Research Japan, on-chain data reveals underlying weakness in BTC price action. By contrast, ETH is displaying notable resilience even as broader crypto market momentum fades
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-ethereum-strength-on-chain-data/

data.description:

This aggressive movement at the top of the board followed new signals from the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ether-record-4880-sol-200-xrp-3-spot/
